name: Daun School Bus Svc
principals: Deanna Young (owner); late John L. 'Jack' Daun (co-owner, d. Apr 2024)
recent_news: Co-owner Jack Daun, who ran Daun Bus Services with sister Deanna Young for ~60 years, passed away April 19, 2024 — creates clear succession event at a multi-generational family operator.
fit_notes: Strong tuck-in candidate: 60+ year family-owned operator in eastern WI with entrenched district contracts (Chilton since 1962, New Holstein recent win), recent owner death creates near-term succession opportunity. Small ~25-employee single-yard fits Summit tuck-in profile.

name: Jirau Bus Line Corp
districts_or_customers: Likely Puerto Rico Dept. of Education routes (Utuado/Ponce region)
recent_news: USDOT 3405054 registered March 2020 from Guaynabo address; intrastate Puerto Rico carrier. One source indicates inactive authority status — no confirming web presence beyond directory listings.
fit_notes: Limited public footprint; small (~31 employees) PR school transporter in mountainous Utuado region. PR market is highly fragmented under DE contracts; geographic/regulatory complexity and unclear authority status reduce tuck-in attractiveness without primary diligence.

name: Lusito Omnibus
recent_news: Luisito's Omnibus Inc. (proper spelling) received SBA PPP loan of $16,700 in March 2021. Self-describes as 30+ years serving the West region with 47-passenger motor coaches equipped with ramps, A/C, restrooms.
fit_notes: Established (~30+ yr) western-PR family operator serving schools and charter — but small PPP loan suggests modest payroll/scale. PR market complexity (DE contracting, Jones Act, geographic isolation from Summit's mainland footprint) makes this a low-priority tuck-in candidate.

name: Mid Wisconsin Buses Inc
districts_or_customers: Unified School District of Antigo area
recent_news: Announced Antigo facility closure in May 2015 affecting 28 employees; however FMCSA SAFER currently shows entity active with 34 power units and 31 drivers as of June 2026 — apparent restart or continued intrastate-only operation. MCS-150 last updated 2004 (stale). Related entity 'Mid Wisconsin Coaches Inc' (USDOT 609022) also operates at same address.
fit_notes: Mid-size (~34 buses) northern WI school/coach operator with twin entities (Buses + Coaches) at same Antigo yard. 2015 closure announcement followed by continued FMCSA active status suggests business restructured/downsized — diligence required to confirm scale, contracts, and whether owner is seeking exit. Possible succession given prior distress.

name: Lpi Inc Which Will Do Bus
districts_or_customers: Possibly Douglas County School District area (Minden/Carson Valley)
recent_news: No web footprint located for 'LPI Inc' as a school-bus operator at 1701 County Rd #E3, Minden NV. Awkward company name 'Which Will Do Bus' suggests truncated/registered DBA fragment. Douglas County SD appears to run transportation in-house. Cannot confirm active school-bus operations.
fit_notes: Insufficient evidence this is a real operating school-bus contractor — name appears to be a corporate filing artifact (LPI Inc d/b/a a bus company). With DCSD operating buses in-house, contracted school-bus opportunity in Minden is limited. Low-priority pending phone verification.
